title: ‘Dushman Bhaukla Gaye’: Op Sindoor Hero Havildar Vikas Medade Recalls Daring Mission That Neutralised Pak Post
description: In a conversation with Republic Media Network Editor-In-Chief Arban Goswami, Havildar Medade Vikas Ramdas shared that his decision to move the weapon was critical as enemy shelling would have intensified if his team had not done so at that very moment.
